No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop "psychological resilience (發展心理韌性)", which directly aligns with Target 3.4 on promoting mental health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly fosters critical thinking, innovation, interdisciplinary learning, and problem-solving skills, which are core components of quality education, aligning with Targets 4.4 and 4.7.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course title "Design Thinking and Innovative Development" and its focus on "creative problem-solving" directly foster creativity and innovation, aligning with Target 8.3 for decent work and economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course title "Design Thinking and Innovative Development" and its core content on "創意發想" (creative ideation) directly and strongly align with Target 9.5, which emphasizes enhancing scientific research and innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to reducing inequalities based on income, sex, disability, race, or other status.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course, offered by Public Administration, teaches design thinking for "public sector problems," which can be inferentially applied to inclusive and sustainable urbanization and planning (Target 11.3).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to sustainable consumption, production patterns, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to climate change, its impacts, or mitigation/adaptation strategies.

Life Below Water.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferable content related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course, offered by Public Administration, focuses on solving "public sector problems" and includes a "civil service performance" case, directly supporting effective and accountable institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly aims to cultivate "teamwork spirit" and "interdisciplinary collaboration ability," including group projects, which are foundational for multi-stakeholder partnerships (Targets 17.16, 17.17).
